inputs.label: Basic Dynamic Load Rating (C)
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturer's rated load for 1 million revolutions, from bearing catalog.

inputs.label: Equivalent Dynamic Load (P)
inputs.businessContext: Calculated equivalent radial load considering actual radial and axial forces.

inputs.label: Rotational Speed (n)
inputs.businessContext: Shaft speed in revolutions per minute.

inputs.label: Bearing Life Exponent (p)
inputs.businessContext: 3 for ball bearings, 10/3 (≈3.33) for roller bearings as per ISO 281.

inputs.label: Reliability Factor (a1)
inputs.businessContext: Life adjustment factor for reliability: 1 for 90%, 0.62 for 95%, 0.53 for 96%, etc. (ISO 281).
